
{| class="wikitable sortable"
!Image
!Rank
!type
!idx
!skill
!gene1
!gene2
!gene3
!gene4
!gene5
!gene6
!Awaken Effect
{{#cargo_query:table=Organs
|fields=name,rank,type,idx, skill,hp,atk,def,rush,gene1,gene2,gene3,gene4,gene5,gene6,gene7
|order by= type, idx
|format=template
|template=OrganTableRow
|named args=yes}}
|}
